text:
このお花畑、とっても綺麗ですね。
テトラさん……
さあ、はじめましょう

ごくっ……！
あっ、<%me>さんも撮影に
参加してくださいね！

あッ……
テトラさんのここ……すごい
かわいい……

ちょ、ちょちょちょっともー！
猫ノ宮♪さん、大胆すぎッ。
<%me>さんも撮りすぎー！
This flower field is gorgeous. Let's get started, Tetra. <white><pict cute_icon><c>
Urk! Um, you should join in on the pictures as well, <%me>!
Oh! <white><pict cute_icon><c> Tetra, you look so, so cute. <white><pict cute_icon><c> This place is perfect for you. <white><pict cute_icon><c>
N-Now hold on! I think you're being a bit too bold, Nekonomiya♪. That goes for you too, <%me>! Stop taking so many pictures!
